query:
SELECT deliveryRoom, COUNT(*) as count
FROM orders 
WHERE deliveryCity IS NULL OR deliveryCity = '' OR deliveryCity = '未知城市'
GROUP BY deliveryRoom
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT deliveryRoom, COUNT(*) as count
FROM orders 
WHERE deliveryCity IS NULL OR deliveryCity = '' OR deliveryCity = '未知城市'

LIMIT 20;
